expo.name: FireSafe ITM
expo.description: Professional fire protection systems inspection app following NFPA 25 standards. Manage inspections, generate PDF reports, and track maintenance schedules.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM needs camera access to take photos of fire protection equipment during inspections.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM needs photo library access to attach existing photos to inspection reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM needs permission to save inspection photos to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: FireSafe ITM needs access to your photos to attach them to inspection reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: FireSafe ITM needs camera access to take photos during inspections.
